title: The Wolf of Rug Street
relevance_summary: Multi-million dollar rug pull involving a sitting president's endorsement, followed by another token launch

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves a sudden large token launch and immediate pump-and-dump strategy

summary: Hayden Davis orchestrated a multi-million dollar rug pull using a sitting president's endorsement for the LIBRA token, then launched another token called WOLF. A guard could have detected and blocked the WOLF token launch due to its sudden nature and immediate pump-and-dump strategy.
